author: olvidalo
description: Work with chord sheets (chords over lyrics or inline) in Live Preview and reading mode: Chord diagrams for guitar, ukulele and mandolin, transpose, autoscroll, and more.

manifest.author: Marcel Schaeben
manifest.description: Work with chord sheets (chords over lyrics) in your Vault: Chord diagrams, transpose, autoscroll and more. Works in live preview and reading mode.
manifest.name: Chord Sheets

name: Chord Sheets

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Hide line markers (`%c`, `%t`) in reading mode by default, add new setting to toggle (#41)                                                                                                                    
 - Fix line markers styles missing when they followed inline chords in chords-over-lyrics rendering  (#41)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Custom chord improvements

- improve determination of optimal position and number of frets
- support comma or space separated fret numbers for frets above 9 (#30)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix metadataTypeManager fallback for Obsidian < 1.9.2 (#38)

releases.description: Fix metadataTypeManager compatibility with Obsidian 1.9.2 (#38)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
PDF export / print enhancements:
  - display inline chords over lyrics in reading mode if enabled (#34)
  - hide chord position chooser

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Recognize NC (no-chord) markers so they don't break chord line detection (#36)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Switch to vexchords fork @chordbook/charts to fix layout issues (#28)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

* Add an option to display inline/ChordPro-style chords over lyrics (#22, #23, thanks to @mattbowers for the initial implementation and @Habarug for help with testing)
* Add Baritone Ukulele (#11, olvidalo/chords-db#2, thanks to @eviv-java)
* Add D tuning for Soprano Ukulele (olvidalo/chords-db#1, thanks to @MostFrabjous)

## Improvements

* Add `Cmaj9/B` chord for guitar (#12)
* Add `M9` and `9M` as aliases for `maj9` 

## Fixes

* Do not fall back to base chord for missing slash chords (#12)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Fix: correctly render notes after 4th fret in user defined chords (#24)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add mmaj7 and m+7 as type aliases for minor major seventh chords (#17)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fix chord overview and diagram settings in reading view (#16)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New features

- Enharmonic toggle: switch chords between flat and sharp enharmonic equivalents (based on @MarcelJulian's initial implementation in #2). For now, the button needs to be enabled in settings.

### Improvements

- UI: Replaced text labels in chord block controls with icons, improved hover styles, and added tooltips. 
- Custom chord shapes: Separate styling for chord components (brackets, barre position number, position separator, frets)

### Fixes

- Fix inline chord parsing for input such as `[Am]word[C]`
- Show bracketed part of custom chords in reading view

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed rhythm marker detection

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New features

- Support user defined custom chord shapes such as Bbadd13[x13333], Dm6[4|x2x132] (with capo), or C°[x34_242_] (with barre) ( #15, thanks to @drdguidi!).

### Fixes

- Fixed another inline chord transposition bug (f88956e)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixes

* Fixed transpose issue (#13)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixes

- Fix transposition of inline chords

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New features

- Support common rhythmic markers in chord lines (previously, they could break chord detection in lines such as `| C C/B | Am C/G | F Bb | C | % |`).

### Fixes

- Handle editor and preview view not available when applying settings. This could lead to new settings not being applied in some cases.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New features

- Support for inline chords in brackets such as `[Dm]`
- Highlight section headers in brackets, e. g. `[Verse 1]` (can be disabled in settings)
- Support for [Style Settings](https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-style-settings) for fine-grained customization of colors and styles
- Turn chord highlighting on or off (to disable highlighting but still have chord diagrams)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Fix autoscroll button occasionally not appearing (#7)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- add general support for chord types not recognized by tonal.js
- add 7(5+), 7(+5) and 7+5 as aliases for 7#5
- add 7M as alias for M7
- add m7(9) as alias for m9
- add sus4#5/4(5+)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * better align rendering between read and edit mode (#6)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Use native slash chord support of `tonal` added in v6.0.0
* Fixed detection of arbitrary words containing a slash as chords (#5)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial support for mandolin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Autoscroll improvements

- Allow to set the preferred speed for a note in the frontmatter property `autoscroll-speed` (thanks to @hyungtaecf for suggesting).
- Adjust the scroll interval instead of the scroll increase to determin scroll speed. This fixes an issue where autoscroll would sometimes get stuck at lower speeds.
- Use a non-linear approach to calculate the interval from the speed value for finer control at lower speeds while allowing faster scrolling at higher speeds.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/olvidalo/obsidian-chord-sheets/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4
